code:
import io
import string

fn abs_val(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n < 0
    -n
  else
    n
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  mut have = false
  mut best = 0
  mut best_abs = 0

  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        is_ws = true
      else
        is_ws = false
      end
    end

    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
        let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        let a = abs_val(v)
        if not have
          best = v
          best_abs = a
          have = true
        else if a < best_abs
          best = v
          best_abs = a
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println("min_abs=#{best}")
end
